description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a metallic gray finish and a minimalist design. The lid features a centered, pear-shaped logo in a lighter shade, giving it a distinctive appearance. The keyboard is black with a standard QWERTY layout, and the touchpad is centrally located below the keyboard. The screen is open and displays a desktop interface with a scenic mountain wallpaper and an application window. The laptop's edges are clean, with visible ports on the right side. The overall build suggests a lightweight yet sturdy device suitable for urban environments such as cafes, offices, or public workspaces.
description: A sleek, metallic gray laptop with a pear-shaped logo, black keyboard, and an open screen displaying a desktop interface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile, open screen, and part of the keyboard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the metallic lid and centered pear-shaped logo.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the slim profile, open screen, and visible ports on the right edge.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full keyboard, touchpad, and the screen with desktop content.
attribute_brand_logo: A pear-shaped logo is centered on the laptop lid, rendered in a lighter shade of gray. No text or other distinguishing brand features are visible.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a desktop interface with a mountain wallpaper and an application window.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad visible.
